summary: OBS Studio 3-mode installer script with settings sync
changes: Script 36: OBS Studio installer via Chocolatey (obs-studio) with 3-mode support
OBS modes: install+settings (default), settings-only, install-only via $env:OBS_MODE
Settings sync extracts zip from settings/02 - obs-settings/ to %APPDATA%\obs-studio\
Keywords: obs, obs-studio, obs+settings, obs-settings, install-obs
Mode env var dispatcher updated: $modeEnvVars map now includes 36 = OBS_MODE
